# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI/CD Workflow
on: [push] # or [pull_request] if you want the workflow to be triggered on pushes and pull requests, respectively 
jobs:  
  build-and-deploy:    
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest      
    steps:        
      - name: Checkout code       
        uses: actions/checkout@v2 # If you're using actions/checkout or the equivalent, use this instead.         
          
      - name: Setup NodeJS environment    
        uses: actions/setup-node@v1      
        with:        
            node-version: '14' 
            
      # Add other steps to build your project here if needed  
    # The rest of the workflow is not provided in this example, but you can add as many stages and jobs below.
